title: Structured Reference Roles
goal: Implement #444 so closeout and review evidence can identify issue-reference roles explicitly before finished-work inspection falls back to prose.
non_goals: Do not implement provider-specific GitHub refresh behavior.
Do not rewrite historical archives broadly.
Do not close the #442 parent lane in this slice.

intent.outcome: Make issue-reference semantics explicit enough that parent, next-lane, closed-item, and context references are not inferred only from prose.
intent.constraints: Keep the change compatible with existing closeout and review artifacts.
intent.latitude: Add role-aware parsing and compact summary/report output where it directly supports finished-work inspection.
intent.escalation: Stop if the change requires a full schema migration of historical planning artifacts.

execution.next_step: Archive this completed slice, then promote #445 when continuing the #442 lane.
execution.proof: focused planning installer tests plus proof selector

invariants: Existing artifacts without roles remain supported.
Explicit roles override prose inference when present.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #442: make the plan -> implement -> evaluate continuation loop first-class for long lanes.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #445-#448 remain open after this slice, and #442 remains open until the loop itself is first-class.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #444 closeout, promote the next issue in the dogfooding lane

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Role-aware references should reduce closeout prose massaging and make #443's supersession heuristic safer to evolve.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: GitHub adapter refresh, source payload classification, CLI authority startup surfacing, and historical pressure prioritization.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Ingest those new issues and address them first.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Continue the newly ingested dogfooding issue lane before older roadmap lanes.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm role-aware behavior is generic and not overfit to one archive.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: planning installer/tests and checked-in planning state
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "reference_role or finished_work_inspection"; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Do not migrate all historical artifacts.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: GitHub adapter, root workspace CLI, generated command packages.

stop_conditions.stop when: Reference roles are consumed by inspection with regression coverage.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: The role model needs a broader schema migration.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: The work expands into provider sync or full autopilot implementation.

context_budget.live working set: state, this execplan, #444 issue, finished-work inspection code/tests
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Next active issue is #444 structured reference roles.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before schema migration or broad archive rewrite.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Add structured reference roles for closeout and review evidence.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Stay compatible with existing artifacts and keep execution in checked-in planning.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: The smallest role vocabulary and where to expose counts.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The role behavior cannot be proven without broad historical migration.

immediate_next_action: Add a role-aware regression for parent/next-lane refs not becoming closure claims.
Implement the narrowest compatible role handling.
invariants: Existing unstructured issue references continue to work.
Explicit reference roles should reduce, not increase, false continuation pressure.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Explicit issue-reference roles are higher-trust than prose inference.
open_questions_to_close: Which roles must be represented in compact output for agents to trust closeout?
validation_commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "reference_role or finished_work_inspection"

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/external-intent-evidence.json .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/structured-reference-roles.plan.json packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Closeout/review references with explicit parent or next-lane roles are not treated as closure claims.
Finished-work inspection exposes enough role-aware evidence for compact trust.

execution_run.what happened: Implemented role-aware issue-reference extraction for finished-work inspection. Explicit closure roles now override prose scanning, and parent/next-lane references are exposed as non-closure refs.
execution_run.scope touched: planning installer, planning installer tests, planning state, and this execplan
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "reference_role or finished_work_inspection or suppresses_child_continuation or uses_reference_roles"; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #444 landed; #442 remains open and #445 is the next planned slice.
execution_run.next step: Archive this completed plan and promote #445 when continuing the lane.

finished_run_review.config compliance: used planning-autopilot and self-improvement dogfooding surfaces; kept work inside planning installer/tests and checked-in planning state
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: lower: role-aware refs now distinguish closed_item/source_intent/child from parent_intent/next_lane/context

proof_report.validation proof: Full planning installer tests and planning package ruff passed.
proof_report.proof achieved now: Role-aware finished-work inspection is implemented and regression covered.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: The regression proves closed_item is tracked while parent_intent and next_lane are non-closure refs; live summary exposes role-aware reference counts without increasing continuation pressure.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Ingest those new issues and address them first.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Finished-work inspection now consumes explicit issue-reference roles before prose fallback; focused and full planning package tests passed.
intent_satisfaction.unsolved intent passed to: #445 external intent refresh remains next in the #442 dogfooding lane.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Confirmed higher-level intent must stay recoverable separately from the currently active slice.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Explicit roles keep parent intent, closed slices, and follow-on work from being confused.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can later agents distinguish closure claims from parent or next-lane context without prose interpretation?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The #444 slice landed, but parent #442 remains open for the larger plan -> implement -> evaluate loop.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Role-aware regression covers closed_item vs parent_intent and next_lane references; summary exposes role-aware reference counts.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Parent or next-lane references are again treated as closure claims.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Finished-work inspection now consumes explicit issue-reference roles before prose fallback.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Full planning installer tests and planning package ruff passed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: No Memory promotion needed; the behavior is captured in tests and archived execplan residue.

discard.summary: No durable memory promotion needed; implementation details are covered by tests and archive residue.
